chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1876 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 8920/15 18.12.2017. Petitioner present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. alongwith Syed Salahuddin Rashidi, Deputy Director, Agriculture Department. Petitioner claims to be a contract employee in Agriculture Department, Government of Sindh working as Water Management Officer (Engineering) BPS-17. There is a chequered history of his service record, which shows that previously he was terminated twicely on account of his unauthorized absence but was reinstated after due course. However, finally in pursuance of a show cause notice for his unauthorized absence from 01.04.2012 to 31.10.2012, his service was terminated vide office order dated 23.05.2013. Against the said order he has filed this petition on 28.08.2015. After having heard the parties at some length, we dispose of this petition with consent alongwith listed application in the terms whereby we put the petitioner at liberty to file an appeal / representation against the said termination order through proper channel before the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh, which shall be, however, subject to all just exceptions. After the said appeal is filed by the petitioner, the Chief Secretary shall decide the same in accordance with law within a period of 60 days. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
